name: network-watcher
author: useai-pro
description: Audit and monitor network requests made by OpenClaw skills. Detects data exfiltration, unauthorized API calls, and suspicious outbound connections.
description_zh: 一个安全模块，用于审计和监控OpenClaw技能的网络请求，以检测数据泄露、未经授权的API调用和可疑的出站连接。

name: output-sanitizer
author: useai-pro
description: Sanitize OpenClaw agent output before display. Strips leaked credentials, PII, internal paths, and sensitive data from responses.
description_zh: 该Claude技能用于净化AI代理的输出，在响应被显示或记录前，检测并替换API密钥、个人身份信息（PII）和内部路径等敏感数据，防止信息意外泄露。

name: permission-auditor
author: useai-pro
description: Analyze OpenClaw skill permissions and explain exactly what each permission allows. Identifies over-privileged skills and suggests minimal permission sets.
description_zh: 此技能分析OpenClaw技能的权限请求，解释安全影响，识别过度授权，并为用户建议最小、更安全的权限集。

name: prompt-guard
author: useai-pro
description: Detect and neutralize prompt injection attacks in OpenClaw skill content, user inputs, and external data sources. Prevents instruction hijacking and context manipulation.
description_zh: 一个安全模块，用于检测和防御AI代理中的提示注入攻击，通过模式匹配和分析防止指令劫持和上下文操纵。

name: sandbox-guard
author: useai-pro
description: Generate Docker sandbox configurations for safely running untrusted OpenClaw skills. Isolates filesystem, network, and process access.
description_zh: 生成安全的Docker沙箱配置，通过隔离文件系统、网络和进程访问，以限制性安全配置文件安全运行不受信任的OpenClaw技能。

name: setup-auditor
author: useai-pro
description: Audit your OpenClaw environment for credential leaks, unsafe defaults, and missing sandbox configuration. Wizard-style: answers questions about your setup and produces a fix checklist.
description_zh: 一款安全审计工具，用于扫描OpenClaw环境中的凭证泄露、不安全默认设置和沙箱配置缺失。它提供引导式向导并生成修复清单，以确保技能安全运行。

name: skill-auditor
author: useai-pro
description: Comprehensive security auditor for OpenClaw skills. Checks for typosquatting, dangerous permissions, prompt injection, supply chain risks, and data exfiltration patterns — before you install anything.
description_zh: OpenClaw技能的安全审计工具，在安装前检查仿冒、危险权限、提示注入、供应链风险和数据泄露模式，确保安全。

name: skill-guard
author: useai-pro
description: Runtime security monitor for active OpenClaw skills. Watches file access, network calls, and shell commands. Flags anomalous behavior and enforces permission boundaries.
description_zh: OpenClaw技能运行时安全监控器，跟踪文件访问、网络调用和Shell命令，以检测可疑行为并强制执行声明的权限。

name: skill-vetter
author: useai-pro
description: Security-first vetting for OpenClaw skills. Use before installing any skill from ClawHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.
description_zh: 一个用于OpenClaw技能的安全审计工具，在安装前检查SKILL.md文件的安全风险、分析权限范围并检测可疑模式。

name: mcp-tokenflux-images
author: vaayne
description: Generate images using AI models via TokenFlux API. Use when creating AI-generated images, artwork, or visual content. Triggers on "generate image", "create picture", "AI art", "image generation", "TokenFlux".

name: background-service-manager
author: vamseeachanta
description: Create and manage long-running background processes with start/stop/status controls, logging, and monitoring. Use for batch processing jobs, data pipelines, continuous services, or any long-running tasks.

name: brand-guidelines
author: vamseeachanta
description: Create and maintain brand guidelines including visual identity, voice and tone, and usage rules. Use for establishing brand standards, style guides, and ensuring brand consistency across materials.

name: compliance-check
author: vamseeachanta
description: Verify and enforce coding standards, AI guidelines, and workspace compliance across repositories. Use for standards propagation, compliance verification, and enforcing development best practices.

name: core-coder
author: vamseeachanta
description: Implementation specialist for writing clean, efficient code following best practices and design patterns

name: core-planner
author: vamseeachanta
description: Strategic planning and task orchestration agent for breaking down complex tasks into actionable execution plans
description_zh: 一个规划代理，将复杂任务分解为具有依赖关系的可执行子任务，进行资源分配和风险评估。与Claude Flow集成进行任务编排，使用结构化的YAML格式输出执行计划。
_original_description: A planning agent that breaks down complex tasks into actionable subtasks with dependencies, resource allocation, and risk assessment. It integrates with Claude Flow for task orchestration and uses a structured YAML output format for execution plans.

name: core-researcher
author: vamseeachanta
description: Deep research and information gathering specialist for thorough investigation, pattern analysis, and knowledge synthesis
description_zh: 该技能通过文件分析、模式识别和依赖关系追踪自动化代码库研究。它提供结构化的研究输出和具体的搜索模式，并通过内存共享实现团队协作。帮助开发者系统性地理解陌生代码库。
_original_description: This skill automates codebase research by combining file analysis, pattern recognition, and dependency tracking. It provides structured research outputs with specific search patterns and integrates with team coordination through memory sharing. The tool helps developers understand unfamiliar codebases systematically.

name: core-reviewer
author: vamseeachanta
description: Code review and quality assurance specialist for ensuring code quality, security, and maintainability
description_zh: 代码审查代理，系统检查功能、安全、性能和可维护性。提供具体问题示例和修复方案，包含检查清单和优先级指南。可与现有代码检查和测试工具集成。
_original_description: A code review agent that systematically checks functionality, security, performance, and maintainability. Provides concrete examples of issues and fixes, includes checklists and prioritization guidelines. Integrates with existing tools like linting and testing frameworks.

name: core-tester
author: vamseeachanta
description: Comprehensive testing and quality assurance specialist for ensuring code quality through testing strategies
description_zh: 一个测试代理，能生成单元、集成和端到端测试代码示例。包含环境验证的前后钩子，支持Jest/Vitest集成。涵盖测试金字塔概念、FIRST原则，并提供不同测试类型的具体模式，包含性能和安全性测试示例。
_original_description: A testing agent that generates unit, integration, and E2E tests with code examples. It includes pre/post hooks for environment validation and integrates with Jest/Vitest. Covers test pyramid concepts, FIRST principles, and provides concrete patterns for different test types with performance and security testing examples.

name: data-pipeline-processor
author: vamseeachanta
description: Process data files through transformation pipelines with validation, cleaning, and export. Use for CSV/Excel/JSON data processing, encoding handling, batch operations, and data transformation workflows.

name: document-inventory
author: vamseeachanta
description: Scan and catalog document collections with metadata extraction, categorization, and statistics. Use for auditing document libraries, preparing for knowledge base creation, or understanding large file collections.

name: document-rag-pipeline
author: vamseeachanta
description: Build complete document knowledge bases with PDF text extraction, OCR for scanned documents, vector embeddings, and semantic search. Use this for creating searchable document libraries from folders of PDFs, technical standards, or any document collection.

name: engineering-report-generator
author: vamseeachanta
description: Generate engineering analysis reports with interactive Plotly visualizations, standard report sections, and HTML export. Use for creating dashboards, analysis summaries, and technical documentation with charts.

name: github-multi-repo
author: vamseeachanta
description: Cross-repository swarm orchestration for organization-wide automation and intelligent collaboration. Use for multi-repo coordination, synchronized operations, dependency management, and organization-wide policy changes.

name: github-pr-manager
author: vamseeachanta
description: Comprehensive pull request management with swarm coordination for automated reviews, testing, and merge workflows. Use for PR lifecycle management, multi-reviewer coordination, conflict resolution, and intelligent branch management.

name: github-release-swarm
author: vamseeachanta
description: Orchestrate complex software releases using AI swarms that handle everything from changelog generation to multi-platform deployment. Use for release planning, automated versioning, artifact building, progressive deployment, and multi-repo releases.

name: github-repo-architect
author: vamseeachanta
description: Repository structure optimization and multi-repo management with swarm coordination for scalable project architecture and development workflows. Use for structure analysis, template management, cross-repo synchronization, and architecture recommendations.

name: github-swarm-issue
author: vamseeachanta
description: GitHub issue-based swarm coordination for intelligent task decomposition and progress tracking. Use for transforming issues into multi-agent tasks, automated triage, task breakdown, and issue lifecycle management.

name: parallel-file-processor
author: vamseeachanta
description: Process multiple files in parallel with aggregation and progress tracking. Use for batch file operations, directory scanning, ZIP handling, and parallel data processing with 2-3x performance improvement.

name: pdf
author: vamseeachanta
description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit with OpenAI Codex integration for intelligent PDF-to-Markdown conversion. IMPORTANT - Always convert PDFs to markdown first using Codex, then process the markdown. Also supports text/table extraction, PDF creation, merging/splitting, and forms. Use for all PDF document processing workflows.

name: pdf-text-extractor
author: vamseeachanta
description: Extract text from PDF files with intelligent chunking and metadata preservation. IMPORTANT - For best results, first convert PDFs to markdown using OpenAI Codex (see pdf skill), then process the markdown. Also supports direct PDF text extraction for batch processing, technical documents, standards libraries, research papers, or any PDF collection.

name: sparc-architecture
author: vamseeachanta
description: SPARC Architecture phase specialist for system design, component architecture, interface design, scalability planning, and technology selection

name: sparc-pseudocode
author: vamseeachanta
description: SPARC Pseudocode phase specialist for algorithm design, data structure selection, complexity analysis, and design pattern identification

name: sparc-refinement
author: vamseeachanta
description: SPARC Refinement phase specialist for iterative improvement through TDD, code optimization, refactoring, performance tuning, and quality improvement

name: sparc-specification
author: vamseeachanta
description: SPARC Specification phase specialist for requirements analysis, constraint identification, use case definition, and acceptance criteria creation

name: sparc-workflow
author: vamseeachanta
description: Apply SPARC methodology (Specification, Pseudocode, Architecture, Refinement, Completion) for systematic development. Use for feature development, TDD workflows, and structured problem-solving.
description_zh: 一个系统化开发工作流，引导开发者完成规范、伪代码、架构、重构和完成五个阶段。它在编码前强制结构化思考，包含测试驱动开发实践，并为每个开发阶段提供具体模板。
_original_description: A systematic development workflow that guides developers through Specification, Pseudocode, Architecture, Refinement, and Completion phases. It enforces structured thinking before coding, includes TDD practices, and provides concrete templates for each development stage.

name: testing-production
author: vamseeachanta
description: Production validation specialist ensuring applications are fully implemented and deployment-ready. Use to verify no mock/stub/fake implementations remain, validate against real databases and APIs, perform end-to-end testing with actual systems, and confirm production readiness.

name: theme-factory
author: vamseeachanta
description: Professional styling toolkit with 10 pre-set themes for slides, documents, reports, and HTML pages. Use when applying consistent colors and fonts to any artifact, or when generating custom themes on-the-fly.

name: web-artifacts-builder
author: vamseeachanta
description: Build self-contained interactive web applications as single HTML files. Use for creating demos, prototypes, interactive tools, and standalone web experiences that work without external servers.

name: workspace-cli
author: vamseeachanta
description: Use the workspace-hub unified CLI for repository management, compliance, development tools, and system configuration. Use for navigating workspace tools and executing common operations.

name: yaml-workflow-executor
author: vamseeachanta
description: Execute configuration-driven analysis workflows from YAML files. Use for running analysis pipelines, data processing tasks, and automation workflows defined in YAML configuration.

name: ai-agents
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade AI agent patterns with MCP integration, agentic RAG, handoff orchestration, multi-layer guardrails, observability, token economics, ROI frameworks, and build-vs-not decision guidance (modern best practices)
description_zh: 提供构建AI代理的具体模板和决策树，支持MCP工具集成。涵盖工作流、工具调用、RAG、规划器、多代理、操作系统和代码代理模式。包含明确的交接编排、护栏和可观测性指导。注重可执行流程而非理论。
_original_description: Provides concrete templates and decision trees for building AI agents with MCP tool integration. Covers workflow, tool-using, RAG, planner, multi-agent, OS, and code agent patterns. Includes explicit handoff orchestration, guardrails, and observability guidance. Focuses on executable procedures over theory.

name: ai-llm
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production LLM engineering skill. Covers strategy selection (prompting vs RAG vs fine-tuning), dataset design, PEFT/LoRA, evaluation workflows, deployment handoff to inference serving, and lifecycle operations with cost/safety controls.
description_zh: 该技能为生产环境中的LLM系统构建和运维提供了结构化参考。涵盖架构选择、评估流程、部署模式和运维控制。内容包括决策树、模板以及指向具体实现资源的外部链接。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured reference for building and operating LLM systems in production. It covers architecture selection, evaluation workflows, deployment patterns, and operational controls. The content includes decision trees, templates, and links to external resources for implementation.

name: ai-llm-inference
author: vasilyu1983
description: Operational patterns for LLM inference: latency budgeting, tail-latency control, caching, batching/scheduling, quantization/compression, parallelism, and reliable serving at scale. Emphasizes production-grade performance, cost control, and observability.
description_zh: 提供LLM推理优化的具体操作模式，涵盖延迟预算、批处理、量化和并行化。包含生产部署的决策树和配置模板，专注于可衡量的性能提升和成本控制。
_original_description: Provides concrete operational patterns for optimizing LLM inference, covering latency budgeting, batching, quantization, and parallelism. Includes decision trees and configuration templates for production deployment. Focuses on measurable performance improvements and cost control.

name: ai-ml-data-science
author: vasilyu1983
description: End-to-end data science and ML engineering workflows: problem framing, data/EDA, feature engineering (feature stores), modelling, evaluation/reporting, plus SQL transformations with SQLMesh. Use for dataset exploration, feature design, model selection, metrics and slice analysis, model cards/eval reports, experiment reproducibility, and production handoff (monitoring and retraining).
description_zh: 该技能为端到端数据科学项目提供结构化工作流，涵盖问题定义、数据探索、特征工程、模型训练到生产部署。包含SQLMesh转换、特征存储集成和MLOps实践，如漂移监控和自动重训练。
_original_description: This skill provides structured workflows for end-to-end data science projects, from problem framing to production deployment. It includes EDA, feature engineering with feature stores, model training with LightGBM/scikit-learn, and SQL transformations via SQLMesh. Focuses on MLOps practices like drift monitoring and automated retraining.

name: ai-ml-timeseries
author: vasilyu1983
description: Operational patterns, templates, and decision rules for time series forecasting (modern best practices): tree-based methods (LightGBM), deep learning (Transformers, RNNs), future-guided learning, temporal validation, feature engineering, generative TS (Chronos), and production deployment. Emphasizes explainability, long-term dependency handling, and adaptive forecasting.
description_zh: 提供时间序列预测的现代操作流程，涵盖LightGBM、Transformers和Chronos等方法。包含模型选择决策树、时序验证模式和部署指南，重点防止数据泄露并按预测范围评估结果。
_original_description: Provides operational workflows for time series forecasting with modern methods like LightGBM, Transformers, and Chronos. Includes decision trees for model selection, temporal validation patterns, and production deployment guidance. Focuses on preventing leakage and evaluating forecasts by horizon.

name: ai-mlops
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production MLOps and ML/LLM/agent security skill for deploying and operating ML systems in production (registry + CI/CD, serving, monitoring/drift, evaluation loops, incident response/runbooks, and governance), including GenAI security (prompt injection, jailbreaks, RAG security, privacy, and supply chain).
description_zh: 提供机器学习模型生产部署的具体模式，包括使用dlt的数据摄取、批处理/API部署、漂移检测和事件响应。包含常见任务的模板和清晰的决策树来选择合适策略。涵盖传统机器学习和LLM/RAG的安全考虑。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for deploying ML models to production, including data ingestion with dlt, batch/API deployment, drift detection, and incident response. Includes templates for common tasks and clear decision trees for choosing appropriate strategies. Covers both traditional ML and LLM/RAG security considerations.

name: ai-prompt-engineering
author: vasilyu1983
description: Operational prompt engineering for production LLM apps: structured outputs (JSON/schema), deterministic extractors, RAG grounding/citations, tool/agent workflows, prompt safety (injection/exfiltration), and prompt evaluation/regression testing. Use when designing, debugging, or standardizing prompts for Codex CLI, Claude Code, and OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini APIs.
description_zh: 为使用Claude构建生产级AI系统提供具体的提示工程模式和模板。专注于结构化输出、RAG工作流、智能体工具调用和隐藏推理。包含决策树、检查清单和版本化模板，可直接实施。
_original_description: Provides concrete prompt patterns and templates for building production AI systems with Claude. Focuses on structured outputs, RAG workflows, agent tool calling, and hidden reasoning. Includes decision trees, checklists, and versioned templates for immediate implementation.

name: ai-rag
author: vasilyu1983
description: Complete RAG and search engineering skill. Covers chunking strategies, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector), cross-encoder reranking, query rewriting, ranking pipelines, nDCG/MRR evaluation, and production search systems. Modern patterns for retrieval-augmented generation and semantic search.
description_zh: 提供构建RAG和搜索系统的具体模式，涵盖分块、混合检索、重排序和评估。包含决策树、实施清单以及生产部署模板链接。强调将检索质量与答案质量分离，并将数据陈旧视为正确性错误。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for building RAG and search systems, covering chunking, hybrid retrieval, reranking, and evaluation. Includes decision trees, implementation checklists, and links to templates for production deployment. Focuses on separating retrieval quality from answer quality and treating staleness as a correctness issue.

name: data-analytics-engineering
author: vasilyu1983
description: Analytics engineering for reliable metrics and BI readiness. Build transformation layers, dimensional models, semantic metrics, data quality tests, and documentation. Use when you need dbt or SQL transformation strategy, metrics definition, or analytics data modeling.
description_zh: 该技能为分析工程提供结构化框架，专注于构建数据转换层、定义指标和确保数据质量。它提供了具体的工作流程、文档模板和清晰的维度建模指导，并与相关数据平台和SQL优化技能有良好衔接。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for analytics engineering, focusing on building transformation layers, defining metrics, and ensuring data quality. It offers concrete workflows, templates for documentation, and clear guidance on dimensional modeling. It connects well with related data platform and SQL optimization skills.

name: data-lake-platform
author: vasilyu1983
description: Data lake and lakehouse platform patterns: ingestion/CDC, transformations, open table formats (Iceberg/Delta/Hudi), query and serving engines (Trino/ClickHouse/DuckDB), orchestration, governance/lineage, cost and operations. Self-hosted and cloud options.
description_zh: 提供构建数据湖和数据湖仓的详细参考，包含具体的工具推荐、决策树和架构模式。包含用于数据摄取、转换、存储和查询层的实用模板，并明确指导何时使用每种技术。
_original_description: Provides detailed reference for building data lakes and lakehouses with specific tool recommendations, decision trees, and architecture patterns. Includes practical templates for ingestion, transformation, storage, and query layers with clear guidance on when to use each technology.

name: data-sql-optimization
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade SQL optimization for OLTP systems: EXPLAIN/plan analysis, balanced indexing, schema and query design, migrations, backup/recovery, HA, security, and safe performance tuning across PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, SQLite.
description_zh: 为PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQL Server、Oracle和SQLite等OLTP系统提供SQL优化检查清单和模板。涵盖查询分析、索引、模式设计、迁移、备份和高可用性，包含明确的决策树和平台特定命令。
_original_description: Provides checklists and templates for optimizing SQL in OLTP systems across PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, and SQLite. Covers query analysis, indexing, schema design, migrations, backups, and high availability with clear decision trees and platform-specific commands.

name: dev-api-design
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade API design patterns for REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and tRPC. Covers API architecture, OpenAPI/Swagger specs, versioning/deprecation, authentication/authorization, rate limiting, pagination, error models, contract testing, and developer documentation.
description_zh: 提供REST、GraphQL和gRPC API的设计模式，涵盖版本控制、认证、分页和错误处理。包含API风格选择决策树，并链接到Node.js、Go、Rust和Python的特定最佳实践指南。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for designing REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs with specific guidance on versioning, authentication, pagination, and error handling. Includes decision trees for choosing API styles and links to language-specific best practices for Node.js, Go, Rust, and Python.

name: dev-dependency-management
author: vasilyu1983
description: Package and dependency management patterns across ecosystems (npm, pip, cargo, maven). Covers lockfiles, semantic versioning, dependency security scanning, update strategies, monorepo workspaces, transitive dependencies, and avoiding dependency hell.
description_zh: 提供跨npm、pip、cargo和Maven生态系统的依赖管理具体指导。包含决策树、锁文件策略、安全扫描命令和单体仓库设置。专注于可复现构建和避免依赖冲突，提供具体命令和工作流。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidance for managing dependencies across npm, pip, cargo, and Maven ecosystems. Includes decision trees, lockfile strategies, security scanning commands, and monorepo setup. Focuses on reproducible builds and avoiding dependency conflicts with specific commands and workflows.

name: dev-workflow-planning
author: vasilyu1983
description: Structured development workflows using /brainstorm, /write-plan, and /execute-plan patterns. Transform ad-hoc conversations into systematic project execution with hypothesis-driven planning, incremental implementation, and progress tracking.
description_zh: 该技能提供结构化命令模式，将随意的开发对话转化为系统化的项目执行流程。它强制要求假设驱动的规划、增量式实现和进度跟踪，为各种开发场景提供清晰的检查点和模板。
_original_description: This skill provides structured command patterns (/brainstorm, /write-plan, /execute-plan) to transform ad-hoc development conversations into systematic project execution. It enforces hypothesis-driven planning, incremental implementation, and progress tracking with clear checkpoints and templates for various development scenarios.

name: docs-ai-prd
author: vasilyu1983
description: Write PRDs, specs, and project context optimized for coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Custom GPTs). Includes CLAUDE.md generation, session planning, and templates for creating documentation that tools can execute effectively.
description_zh: 该技能提供为AI编程助手优化的产品需求和项目上下文文档模板与指南。帮助团队编写PRD、技术规格和CLAUDE.md文件，使编码工具能有效执行，减少实施工作中的模糊性。
_original_description: This skill provides templates and guidance for creating product requirements and project context documentation optimized for AI coding assistants. It helps teams write PRDs, specs, and CLAUDE.md files that coding tools can execute effectively, reducing ambiguity in implementation work.

name: docs-codebase
author: vasilyu1983
description: Technical writing patterns for README files, API documentation, architecture decision records (ADRs), changelogs, contributing guides, code comments, and docs-as-code workflows. Covers documentation structure, style guides, Markdown best practices, and documentation testing.
description_zh: 提供用于创建README文件、API文档、架构决策记录、变更日志和贡献指南的即用型模板和决策树。包含针对REST、GraphQL和gRPC文档的具体模式、反模式警告以及与其他开发技能的集成。
_original_description: Provides ready-to-use templates and decision trees for creating README files, API docs, ADRs, changelogs, and contributing guides. Includes specific patterns for REST, GraphQL, and gRPC documentation with anti-pattern warnings and integration with other development skills.

name: document-docx
author: vasilyu1983
description: Create, edit, and analyze Microsoft Word .docx files (reports, contracts, proposals) with styles, tables, headers/footers, template filling, content extraction, and conversion to HTML; support review workflows (comments/highlights) and inspect tracked changes via OOXML when needed using Python/Node.js (python-docx, docxtpl, mammoth.js, docx).
description_zh: 该技能提供对Microsoft Word文档的程序化创建、编辑和分析功能。支持使用python-docx、docx和mammoth.js库的Python和Node.js工作流。包含报告和合同模板、内容提取以及修订跟踪功能。
_original_description: This skill provides programmatic creation, editing, and analysis of Microsoft Word documents. It supports Python and Node.js workflows with python-docx, docx, and mammoth.js libraries. Includes templates for reports and contracts, content extraction, and tracked changes functionality.

name: document-pdf
author: vasilyu1983
description: Extract text/tables from PDFs, create formatted PDFs, merge/split/rotate, handle forms and metadata. Supports pdf-lib/pdfkit (Node.js) and pypdf/pdfplumber/ReportLab (Python).
description_zh: 提供Node.js和Python环境下PDF创建、文本提取、表格解析、合并拆分、表单处理等常见任务的代码示例。包含库选择指南和现代PDF工作流最佳实践。
_original_description: Provides code examples for common PDF tasks across Node.js and Python, covering creation, text extraction, table parsing, merging, splitting, and form handling. Includes library selection guidance and modern best practices for PDF workflows.

name: document-pptx
author: vasilyu1983
description: Create, edit, and analyze PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations: generate decks (pitch/QBR/training), apply templates/masters, add charts/images/tables, manage speaker notes, and extract slide content. Use when users mention PowerPoint/PPTX, slides, pitch deck, QBR/board deck, or presentation automation. Supports python-pptx, PptxGenJS, and PPTX-Automizer.
description_zh: 该技能使用python-pptx和pptxgenjs库实现程序化PowerPoint创建与编辑。涵盖幻灯片生成、图表、图片、表格、动画和演讲者备注，提供Python和Node.js的实用示例。包含现代演示文稿最佳实践和决策框架。
_original_description: This skill provides programmatic PowerPoint creation and editing using python-pptx and pptxgenjs libraries. It covers slide generation, charts, images, tables, animations, and speaker notes with practical examples for both Python and Node.js environments. Includes modern presentation best practices and decision frameworks.

name: document-xlsx
author: vasilyu1983
description: Create, edit, audit, and extract Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx): generate reports/exports, apply formulas/formatting/charts/data validation, parse existing workbooks, and avoid spreadsheet risks (formula injection, broken links, hidden rows). Supports ExcelJS, openpyxl, pandas, XlsxWriter, and SheetJS.
description_zh: 该技能通过多种库（exceljs、openpyxl、pandas、xlsx）提供编程式Excel电子表格创建、编辑和分析功能。包含生成带公式、格式、图表和数据验证的报告等常见任务的具体代码示例。文档清晰区分Node.js和Python实现，并提供工具选择决策树。
_original_description: This skill provides programmatic Excel spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis using multiple libraries (exceljs, openpyxl, pandas, xlsx). It includes concrete code examples for common tasks like generating reports with formulas, formatting, charts, and data validation. The documentation clearly distinguishes between Node.js and Python implementations and provides decision trees for tool selection.

name: git-commit-message
author: vasilyu1983
description: Auto-generates conventional commit messages from git diffs with tiered format enforcement. Analyzes staged changes to produce meaningful commit messages following Conventional Commits specification.
description_zh: 该技能分析暂存的git变更，根据Conventional Commits规范生成提交信息。它采用三级格式系统，根据提交重要性匹配信息详细程度，从关键功能的详细文档到次要更新的简洁信息。工具包含验证规则阻止通用信息，并为敏感提交提供安全指导。
_original_description: This skill analyzes staged git changes to generate commit messages following Conventional Commits specification. It uses a three-tier format system that matches message detail to commit importance, from detailed documentation for critical features to concise messages for minor updates. The tool includes validation rules to block generic messages and provides security guidance for sensitive commits.

name: git-workflow
author: vasilyu1983
description: Modern Git collaboration patterns for team development - branching strategies, PR workflows, commit conventions, code review practice, repo hardening, CI merge queues, releases/hotfixes, and merge/rebase conflict resolution
description_zh: 为团队提供结构化的Git工作流指导，涵盖分支策略、提交规范、代码审查和发布自动化。包含决策树、模板和CI/CD工具集成，专注于实际实施，提供清晰的示例和反面模式。
_original_description: Provides structured guidance on Git workflows for teams, covering branching strategies, commit conventions, PR reviews, and release automation. Includes decision trees, templates, and integration with CI/CD tools. Focuses on practical implementation with clear examples and anti-patterns.

name: help-center-design
author: vasilyu1983
description: Design or audit AI-first help centers/knowledge bases/FAQs, including taxonomy, article templates, analytics, and AI support (RAG, chatbot, escalation), using 2025-2026 best practices
description_zh: 提供构建AI优先帮助中心和知识库的结构化模板与现代最佳实践。包含决策矩阵、平台对比、实施清单以及面向2025-2026自助服务系统的关键指标。
_original_description: Provides structured templates and modern best practices for designing AI-first help centers and knowledge bases. Includes decision matrices, platform comparisons, implementation checklists, and metrics for 2025-2026 self-service systems.

name: marketing-ai-search-optimization
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when optimizing content for AI search engines and answer platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews). Covers GEO: crawl controls (robots/WAF/llms.txt), answer-ready content and entity pages, citation strategy, and measurement (query bank, share of model). For building monitoring infrastructure, see project-aeo-monitoring-tools.
description_zh: 提供现代搜索可见性的可操作框架，涵盖意图建模、SERP功能优化和信任信号。包含清单、模板和明确的执行与避免指南，将核心基础与可选AI自动化分开。
_original_description: Provides actionable frameworks for modern search visibility, covering intent modeling, SERP feature optimization, and trust signals. Includes checklists, templates, and clear do/avoid guidance. Separates core fundamentals from optional AI automation.

name: marketing-content-strategy
author: vasilyu1983
description: Content strategy and operations for marketing teams. Positioning, messaging hierarchy, content pillars, editorial calendars, trust-building content, brand architecture, GEO/AI discovery, and content ROI measurement. Use for positioning sprints, trust audits, messaging matrices, content pillar planning, editorial ops, or ROI attribution (including regulated industries).
description_zh: 该技能提供基于决策树的内容营销策略构建系统。包含定位、信任构建、信息层级和内容规划的具体框架、模板和检查清单。以金融科技/敏感数据为例，专注于执行，并明确区分AI自动化部分。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured, decision-tree-based system for developing marketing content strategy. It offers specific frameworks for positioning, trust-building, messaging, and content planning, with clear templates and checklists. It focuses on execution with fintech/sensitive data examples and separates AI automation sections.

name: marketing-cro
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when optimizing conversion rates, designing A/B tests, or improving landing pages. Covers A/B testing methodology, landing page optimization, form design, statistical significance, funnel analysis, and CRO prioritization frameworks.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套结构化的转化率优化框架，涵盖A/B测试方法、落地页优化、表单设计和漏斗分析。包含可直接使用的检查清单、行业基准和模板，供营销和产品团队应用。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for Conversion Rate Optimization, covering A/B testing methodology, landing page optimization, form design, and funnel analysis. It includes practical checklists, benchmarks, and templates for immediate application by marketing and product teams.

name: marketing-email-automation
author: vasilyu1983
description: Email marketing automation for HubSpot/Klaviyo/Mailchimp (and similar ESPs): design trigger-based lifecycle workflows (welcome, onboarding, nurture, win-back, cart abandonment), define segmentation + suppression/frequency policies, troubleshoot deliverability (SPF/DKIM/DMARC, one-click unsubscribe, list hygiene), and measure incrementality/ROI (holdouts, RPE, retention economics).
description_zh: 提供适用于HubSpot、Klaviyo等主流平台的电子邮件营销自动化工作流详细模板。涵盖欢迎序列、培育流程和送达率设置，包含明确的触发条件和时间线。该技能为弃购挽回、用户激活等常见场景提供了可直接使用的蓝图，对营销人员开箱即用。
_original_description: Provides detailed, ready-to-use templates for email marketing automation workflows across major platforms like HubSpot and Klaviyo. It covers welcome sequences, nurture flows, and deliverability setup with clear trigger conditions and timing. The skill includes specific blueprints for common scenarios like abandoned cart and onboarding, making it immediately actionable for marketers.

name: marketing-leads-generation
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when building or fixing B2B pipeline. Revenue-aligned demand generation with lead types, funnel design, conversion paths, scoring/routing, attribution, ABS motions, and compliance.
description_zh: 该技能为B2B潜在客户生成提供了一个结构化框架，明确定义了线索类型、漏斗阶段、内容门控策略和归因模型。它侧重于操作执行，包含清晰的表格、决策树和诊断问题。提供实用模板，并将核心基础与可选的AI自动化分开。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for B2B lead generation, defining lead types, funnel stages, gating strategies, and attribution models. It focuses on operational execution with clear tables, decision trees, and diagnostic questions. Includes practical templates and separates core fundamentals from optional AI automation.

name: marketing-paid-advertising
author: vasilyu1983
description: Paid advertising strategy for Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn - campaign structure, bidding, audiences, creative, measurement, budget allocation, unit economics (CAC/LTV), revenue attribution, incrementality, payback period, and sales alignment.
description_zh: 提供跨谷歌、Meta、TikTok和LinkedIn的付费广告活动详细操作指南。包含平台选择矩阵、广告系列结构框架、竞价策略和受众定位策略。该技能侧重于设置、扩展和衡量的具体操作步骤。
_original_description: Provides a detailed operational guide for paid advertising campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, and LinkedIn. It includes platform selection matrices, campaign structure frameworks, bidding strategies, and audience targeting tactics. The skill focuses on actionable steps for setup, scaling, and measurement.

name: marketing-social-media
author: vasilyu1983
description: Sustainable social media marketing and paid social: content systems, community management, influencer ops, social commerce, and attribution (2026).
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套跨主流社交媒体平台的详细运营框架，专注于可持续的营销实践。它明确了内容类型、互动指标和分发流程，将核心原则与可选自动化分开，提供了可直接执行的表格和检查清单。
_original_description: This skill provides a detailed operational framework for social media marketing across major platforms. It focuses on sustainable practices with clear content typology, engagement metrics, and distribution workflows. The guide separates core principles from optional automation, offering actionable tables and checklists for implementation.

name: ops-devops-platform
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade DevOps and platform engineering patterns: Kubernetes, Terraform, containers, GitOps, CI/CD, observability, incident response, security hardening, and cloud-native operations (AWS, GCP, Azure, Kafka).
description_zh: 提供具体的DevOps模式，包含决策树、工具命令和Kubernetes、Terraform、GitOps、CI/CD的模板。涵盖成本治理、反模式，并链接到操作深度指南。侧重于可操作的指导而非理论。
_original_description: Provides concrete DevOps patterns with decision trees, tool commands, and templates for Kubernetes, Terraform, GitOps, and CI/CD. Includes cost governance, anti-patterns, and links to operational deep dives. Focuses on actionable guidance over theory.

name: product-management
author: vasilyu1983
description: Founder-PM operating system: discovery, strategy, roadmaps, metrics, prioritization (RICE/ICE/kill criteria), product-market fit measurement (Sean Ellis, retention curves), stakeholder management, scope negotiation, and leadership - using templates, checklists, and patterns (no theory).
description_zh: 提供产品管理核心任务的即用模板，包括客户访谈、成果路线图、OKR和一对一会议。包含决策树引导用户选择正确模板，专注于可操作执行而非理论，并给出明确的行为指南。
_original_description: Provides ready-to-use templates for core product management tasks like customer interviews, outcome roadmaps, OKRs, and 1:1 meetings. Includes a decision tree to guide users to the right template. Focuses on operational execution over theory, with clear do/avoid guidelines.

name: project-astrology-chinese
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when users ask about Chinese astrology, zodiac compatibility, BaZi (Four Pillars) birth charts, Five Elements, Zi Wei Dou Shu, Flying Stars Feng Shui, or Qi Men Dun Jia timing. Calculates signs from birth data, interprets charts, and provides forecasts. (project)
description_zh: 该技能提供关于中国生肖系统的详细信息，包括十二生肖、五行、八字命盘分析和配对指南。它作为一个结构化参考工具，用于回答有关中国占星概念、计算和解释的具体问题。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed information about the Chinese zodiac system, including the 12 animal signs, Five Elements (Wu Xing), BaZi (Four Pillars) birth chart analysis, and compatibility guides. It functions as a structured reference tool for answering specific questions about Chinese astrology concepts, calculations, and interpretations.

name: project-astrology-numerology
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when developing astrology/numerology apps, validating chart calculations (timezone/DST, quadrant handling), or producing psychology-first interpretations. Expert advisor (30+ years) catches common bugs (D026-D028) and defines accuracy/test standards. (project)
description_zh: 该技能作为星相学/命理学代码项目的领域专家顾问。它提供具体的验证清单、过往项目中的已知错误模式以及公式参考，旨在捕获天文计算中的常见错误，如时区处理和象限信息丢失。
_original_description: This skill acts as a domain expert advisor for astrology/numerology calculations in code projects. It provides specific validation checklists, known bug patterns from past projects, and references to formulas. It's designed to catch common errors in astronomical calculations like timezone handling and quadrant loss.

name: project-astrology-tarot-divination
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when interpreting Tarot cards, designing spreads, performing readings, or building AI tarot features (daily card, card combinations, timing). Covers Major/Minor Arcana meanings, spread layouts (incl. Celtic Cross), reading ethics, and safe AI positioning. Not for medical/legal/crisis support or death/illness predictions. (project)
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个塔罗牌解读的结构化框架，包含78张牌的正逆位含义、凯尔特十字等常见牌阵，以及与占星时机的结合。它强制执行解读伦理准则，并通过决策树将用户请求路由到相应资源。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for Tarot card readings, including card meanings for all 78 cards (upright and reversed), common spread layouts like the Celtic Cross, and integration with astrological timing. It enforces ethical guidelines for readings and includes decision trees to route user requests to appropriate resources.

name: project-astrology-vedic
author: vasilyu1983
description: Vedic/Jyotish (sidereal) astrology calculations and interpretation including Kundali/Kundli, Lagna, Rashi (Moon sign), Nakshatra, Vimshottari Dasha, yogas, vargas (D-9/D-10), Sade Sati, prashna (horary), panchang/muhurta, and Ashtakoot compatibility. Use when user asks for Vedic/Jyotish/Indian astrology or mentions those terms; not for Western/Tropical, Chinese astrology, or Tarot. (project)
description_zh: 该技能提供详细的吠陀占星分析，包括恒星黄道计算、大运系统和星宿解读。包含行星、星座和月宿的完整参考表，并明确指导何时使用它而非其他占星技能。文档清晰区分了吠陀与西方占星术，并解释了关键概念如岁差系统。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed Vedic astrology analysis with sidereal zodiac calculations, Dasha systems, and Nakshatra interpretations. It includes comprehensive reference tables for planets, signs, and lunar mansions, plus clear guidelines for when to use it versus other astrology skills. The documentation differentiates Vedic from Western astrology and explains key concepts like Ayanamsa systems.

name: qa-agent-testing
author: vasilyu1983
description: QA harness for agentic systems: scenario suites, determinism/flake controls, tool sandboxing, scoring rubrics (including LLM-as-judge), and regression protocols covering success, safety, reliability, latency, and cost.
description_zh: 为LLM智能体测试提供结构化框架，包含确定性控制、评分标准和回归协议。提供测试用例设计、拒绝场景和检查清单模板。关注任务成功率、安全性、可靠性、延迟和可调试性。
_original_description: Provides a structured framework for testing LLM agents with deterministic controls, scoring rubrics, and regression protocols. Includes templates for test case design, refusal scenarios, and quality checklists. Focuses on task success, safety, reliability, latency, and debuggability.

name: qa-api-testing-contracts
author: vasilyu1983
description: API testing and contract validation across REST (OpenAPI 3.1), GraphQL (SDL), and gRPC (proto). Use when you need schema linting/validation, breaking-change detection (openapi diff, GraphQL schema diff, buf breaking), consumer/provider contract tests (Pact or schema-driven), negative/security testing, and CI quality gates.
description_zh: 该技能为API测试策略的设计和实施提供结构化指导，专注于契约验证、模式检查和CI/CD集成。涵盖REST、GraphQL和gRPC API，提供测试计划、负面测试和质量门控的实用工作流程。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for designing and implementing API testing strategies, focusing on contract validation, schema checks, and CI/CD integration. It covers REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs with practical workflows for test planning, negative testing, and quality gates.

name: qa-debugging
author: vasilyu1983
description: Systematic debugging playbook for application errors and incidents: crashes, regressions, intermittent failures, production-only bugs, performance issues, stack traces, log/trace analysis, profiling, and distributed systems root cause analysis.
description_zh: 该技能为软件工程师提供结构化的调试工作流程和参考资料。涵盖在不同环境中复现、隔离和修复问题的系统方法。包含决策树、工具推荐和常见调试场景的实用清单。
_original_description: This skill provides structured debugging workflows and reference materials for software engineers. It covers systematic approaches to reproduce, isolate, and fix issues across different environments. Includes decision trees, tool recommendations, and practical checklists for common debugging scenarios.

name: qa-docs-coverage
author: vasilyu1983
description: Docs as QA: audit doc coverage and freshness, validate runbooks, and maintain documentation quality gates for APIs, services, events, and operational workflows. Includes AI-assisted audits, observability patterns, and automated coverage tracking.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套系统化审计代码库文档覆盖率的方法。它能识别文档缺口，按风险等级（P1-P3）对缺失文档进行优先级排序，并包含生成缺失文档的工作流程。重点关注操作手册、API契约和服务文档，提供实用的模板和检查清单。
_original_description: This skill provides a systematic method for auditing documentation coverage in codebases. It helps identify gaps, prioritize missing docs by risk level (P1-P3), and includes workflows for generating missing documentation. It focuses on operational runbooks, API contracts, and service documentation, with templates and checklists for practical use.

name: qa-observability
author: vasilyu1983
description: Implement and validate observability for quality engineering: OpenTelemetry logs/metrics/traces, W3C trace context propagation, SLI/SLO + error-budget release gates, burn-rate alerting, trace-based debugging for test failures, sampling/cardinality/cost controls, profiling (CPU/memory/continuous), synthetic/RUM signals, and APM stack integrations (Prometheus/Grafana/Jaeger/Tempo/Loki/Datadog/New Relic).
description_zh: 该技能为QA工作流集成可观测性提供了具体模式，涵盖OpenTelemetry插桩、SLO/SLI定义、基于追踪的调试和成本感知监控。提供了Jaeger、Prometheus、Grafana等工具的具体指导，包含实用的决策树和反模式警告。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for integrating observability into QA workflows, covering OpenTelemetry instrumentation, SLO/SLI definitions, trace-based debugging, and cost-aware monitoring. It offers specific guidance on tools like Jaeger, Prometheus, and Grafana, with practical decision trees and anti-pattern warnings.

name: qa-refactoring
author: vasilyu1983
description: Safe refactoring for legacy or complex codebases: preserve behavior while improving structure, reducing technical debt, and tightening quality gates. Use for characterization tests, seams/adapters, incremental refactor loops, strangler migrations, refactor PR sizing, and CI guardrails (lint/type/contract tests).
description_zh: 该技能提供安全重构的具体模式，重点包括特征测试、接缝创建和增量更改。它包含决策树、检查清单和模板，用于处理长方法、遗留代码现代化等常见重构场景。指导原则强调行为保持和CI质量门禁。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for safe refactoring, focusing on characterization tests, seam creation, and incremental changes. It includes decision trees, checklists, and templates for common refactoring scenarios like long methods and legacy code modernization. The guidance emphasizes behavior preservation and CI quality gates.

name: qa-resilience
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when designing or testing resilience for distributed systems: timeouts/deadlines, retries (backoff + jitter, retry budgets), circuit breakers, bulkheads, backpressure/load shedding, graceful degradation, health checks, chaos experiments/game days/DR drills, and SLO-based reliability gates.
description_zh: 提供测试系统弹性的具体模式，包括断路器、重试策略、超时策略和混沌实验。包含决策树、库推荐和需要避免的反模式。重点验证降级模式和生成环境防护栏。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for testing system resilience including circuit breakers, retry strategies, timeout policies, and chaos experiments. Includes decision trees, library recommendations, and anti-patterns to avoid. Focuses on validating degraded modes and production guardrails.

name: qa-testing-ios
author: vasilyu1983
description: Run and stabilize iOS tests (XCTest, XCUITest, Swift Testing) on simulators and devices with xcodebuild/simctl: choose destinations, manage simulator state, control flakes (locale/time/network/animations), configure CI, and collect/parse xcresult artifacts.
description_zh: 提供使用Xcode工具进行iOS测试自动化的具体命令和策略。涵盖模拟器管理、测试执行、减少测试不稳定性以及CI集成，包含具体的bash命令和实用指南。
_original_description: Provides concrete commands and strategies for iOS testing automation using Xcode tools. Covers simulator management, test execution, flake reduction, and CI integration with specific bash commands and practical guidelines.

name: qa-testing-mobile
author: vasilyu1983
description: Mobile app testing strategy and execution for iOS and Android (native + cross-platform): choose automation frameworks, define device matrix, control flakes, validate performance/reliability/accessibility, and set CI + release gates. Use when you need a mobile QA plan, device lab/CI setup, or guidance on XCUITest/Espresso/Appium/Detox/Maestro/Flutter testing.
description_zh: 为iOS和Android移动应用测试提供结构化指导。涵盖设备选型、自动化框架选择、CI集成和发布就绪检查。包含实用模板并引用平台特定技能获取详细实现方案。
_original_description: Provides structured guidance for mobile app testing across iOS and Android. Covers device selection, automation framework choices, CI integration, and release readiness checks. Includes practical templates and references to platform-specific skills for deeper implementation details.

name: qa-testing-playwright
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when writing E2E web tests, debugging flaky tests, or setting up Playwright CI. Covers: stable selectors (getByRole), parallelization/sharding, flake control, network mocking, visual testing, MCP/AI automation, and CI/CD integration.
description_zh: 提供详细的Playwright端到端测试实施指南，重点关注测试稳定性、CI/CD集成和成本效益测试策略。涵盖选择器最佳实践、测试稳定性控制、并行执行以及何时使用E2E测试。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for implementing Playwright end-to-end tests with focus on test stability, CI/CD integration, and cost-effective testing strategies. Covers selector best practices, flake control, parallel execution, and when to use E2E versus other test types.

name: qa-testing-strategy
author: vasilyu1983
description: Risk-based quality engineering test strategy for software delivery. Use when defining or updating test strategy, selecting unit/integration/contract/E2E/performance/security coverage, setting CI quality gates and suite budgets, managing flaky tests and test data, and operationalizing observability-first debugging and release criteria.
description_zh: 提供基于风险的测试框架，涵盖单元、集成、契约、端到端、性能和安全性测试。包含左移门禁、基于SLO的测试稳定性管理、带时间预算的CI经济学和可观测性优先的调试流程。提供具体的运行手册和检查清单模板。
_original_description: Provides a risk-based testing framework covering unit, integration, contract, E2E, performance, and security testing. Includes shift-left gates, flake management with SLOs, CI economics with time budgets, and observability-first debugging workflows. Offers concrete templates for runbooks and checklists.

name: router-engineering
author: vasilyu1983
description: Master orchestration for routing technical problems through the engineering skill set (AI/ML, software, data, APIs, Claude Code)
description_zh: 一个路由技能，根据关键词和问题领域将技术问题定向到合适的工程子技能。它映射了AI/ML、软件开发、数据和Claude Code框架中的32个专业技能，提供决策树和实施模式。
_original_description: A routing skill that directs technical questions to appropriate engineering sub-skills based on keywords and problem domains. It maps 32 specialized skills across AI/ML, software development, data, and Claude Code frameworks, providing decision trees and implementation patterns.

name: router-main
author: vasilyu1983
description: Universal entry point that routes any query to the right router (startup, engineering, operations, QA)
description_zh: 作为中央调度器，分析用户查询并将其路由到相应的领域路由器（创业、工程、运维）。提供基于关键词检测的清晰路由逻辑和决策树。管理三个领域超过72个专项技能，并展示工作流示例。
_original_description: Acts as a central dispatcher that analyzes user queries and routes them to appropriate domain-specific routers (startup, engineering, operations). Provides clear routing logic with keyword detection and decision trees. Handles 72+ specialized skills across three domains with example workflows.

name: router-operations
author: vasilyu1983
description: Master orchestration for routing QA, testing, DevOps, observability, git, and docs questions through 18 operational skills
description_zh: 将运维问题路由到15个专业技能，涵盖QA、测试、DevOps、可观测性和Git工作流。提供决策树、领域检测和部署检查清单，帮助团队根据问题匹配合适的解决方案。
_original_description: Routes operations questions to 15 specialized skills for QA, testing, DevOps, observability, and git workflows. Provides decision trees, domain detection, and pre/post-deployment checklists. Helps teams navigate complex operational toolchains by matching problems to appropriate solutions.

name: router-startup
author: vasilyu1983
description: Routes startup and business requests (idea validation, market/competitors, pricing, GTM, fundraising, marketing, business docs) to the right skills; hands off building and ops to other routers
description_zh: 一个主路由技能，将创业相关查询定向到23个专业子技能。它使用关键词匹配和基于场景的决策树，将用户连接到用于创意验证、市场调研和商业规划的正确分析工具。
_original_description: A master routing skill that directs startup-related queries to 23 specialized sub-skills. It uses keyword matching and context-based decision trees to connect users with the right analysis tools for idea validation, market research, and business planning.

name: software-architecture-design
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when designing system architecture, choosing between monolith/microservices/serverless, planning scalability, or making technology decisions. Covers microservices, event-driven, CQRS, modular monoliths, distributed systems, and reliability patterns for production-grade software.
description_zh: 该技能为软件架构决策提供结构化指导，涵盖模式选择、可扩展性设计和弹性模式。它提供ADR等文档模板，并包含真实的生产环境陷阱案例。决策树帮助根据项目需求在单体、微服务和事件驱动架构之间做出选择。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for software architecture decisions, including pattern selection, scalability design, and resilience patterns. It offers templates for documentation like ADRs and includes real-world production gotchas. The decision tree helps choose between monoliths, microservices, and event-driven architectures based on project needs.

name: software-backend
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade backend service development across Node.js (Express/Fastify/NestJS/Hono), Bun, Python (FastAPI), Go, and Rust (Axum), with PostgreSQL and common ORMs (Prisma/Drizzle/SQLAlchemy/GORM/SeaORM). Use for REST/GraphQL/tRPC APIs, auth (OIDC/OAuth), caching, background jobs, observability (OpenTelemetry), testing, deployment readiness, and zero-trust defaults.
description_zh: 该技能为使用多种语言（Node.js、Python、Go、Rust）构建后端API提供了具体的模式和决策树。包含具体的工具推荐、版本号以及指向身份验证、错误处理和日志记录等共享工具的链接。内容以速查表形式组织，并提供了清晰的使用时机指导。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns and decision trees for building backend APIs across multiple languages (Node.js, Python, Go, Rust). It includes specific tool recommendations, version numbers, and links to shared utilities for auth, error handling, and logging. The content is organized as a quick reference with clear when-to-use guidance.

name: software-clean-code-standard
author: vasilyu1983
description: Canonical, cross-language clean code standard with stable rule IDs (CC-*). Use when writing/reviewing code, defining team standards, or mapping lint/CI findings to consistent CC-* rule citations.
description_zh: 提供规范的清洁代码标准，包含跨语言使用的稳定CC-*规则ID。包含规则应用决策树、框架特定语言覆盖层和例外豁免系统。附带API审查、安全性和性能的可重用检查清单，以及认证、日志记录和错误处理的实用模式。
_original_description: Provides a canonical clean code standard with stable CC-* rule IDs for cross-language use. Includes decision trees for applying rules, language overlays for framework-specific nuances, and waiver systems for exceptions. Comes with reusable checklists for API reviews, security, and performance, plus utility patterns for auth, logging, and error handling.

name: software-code-review
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when reviewing code, pull requests, or diffs. Provides patterns, checklists, and templates for systematic code review with a focus on correctness, security, readability, performance, and maintainability.
description_zh: 提供跨领域代码审查的结构化检查清单和模板，涵盖安全性、性能、正确性和可维护性。包含选择审查重点的决策树，以及针对.NET/EF Core加密应用的专门指导。组织清晰，触发条件明确，示例实用。
_original_description: Provides structured checklists and templates for systematic code review across multiple domains including security, performance, correctness, and maintainability. Includes decision trees for selecting review focus areas and specialized guidance for .NET/EF Core crypto applications. Well-organized with clear trigger conditions and practical examples.

name: software-crypto-web3
author: vasilyu1983
description: Use when building blockchain applications or smart contracts across EVM (Solidity), Solana (Anchor/Rust), Cosmos (CosmWasm), and TON, including security/audit workflows, fuzz/invariant testing, upgrades, custody/signing, and backend integration (RPC, indexers, webhooks).
description_zh: 提供以太坊、Solana和Cosmos智能合约开发的具体模式。包含平台选择决策树、安全检查清单和部署流程。涵盖测试、Gas优化和升级模式，附带具体工具命令。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for building smart contracts on Ethereum, Solana, and Cosmos. Includes decision trees for platform selection, security checklists, and deployment workflows. Covers testing, gas optimization, and upgrade patterns with specific tool commands.

name: software-frontend
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade frontend engineering for Next.js/React, Vue/Nuxt, Angular, Svelte/SvelteKit, Remix, and Vite+React. Use for framework selection, App Router/RSC patterns, TypeScript strict-mode UI code, Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui, state/data flows (TanStack Query, Zustand), forms validation, testing (Vitest/Testing Library/Playwright), performance (Core Web Vitals), and accessibility (WCAG 2.2).
description_zh: 提供使用 Next.js 16、React 19、TypeScript 和 Tailwind CSS 构建现代前端应用的详细指南。包含框架选择决策树、具体版本推荐以及常见库（如 shadcn/ui 和 TanStack Query）的集成模式。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for building modern frontend applications with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Includes framework selection decision trees, specific version recommendations, and integration patterns for common libraries like shadcn/ui and TanStack Query.

name: software-localisation
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade i18n/l10n patterns for React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, and Node.js. Covers library selection (i18next/react-i18next, FormatJS/react-intl, next-intl, vue-i18n, @angular/localize, Lingui, typesafe-i18n), ICU message format, RTL support, locale routing/detection, TMS integration, string extraction, and CI/CD translation workflows. Use when setting up or debugging localisation in a codebase.
description_zh: 为React、Vue、Angular和Node.js项目提供详细的国际化/本地化决策树和库对比。涵盖ICU消息格式、翻译键模式、CI/CD工作流等核心概念。包含最新版本参考和常见任务的实用指南。
_original_description: Provides a detailed decision tree and library comparison for implementing i18n/l10n in React, Vue, Angular, and Node.js projects. Covers key concepts like ICU message format, translation key patterns, and CI/CD workflows. Includes up-to-date version references and practical guidance for common tasks.

name: software-mobile
author: vasilyu1983
description: Production-grade mobile app development and architecture for iOS (Swift/SwiftUI/UIKit), Android (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose), and cross-platform (React Native, Flutter, Kotlin Multiplatform, WebView). Use for navigation, state, networking, offline storage, auth/passkeys, push, performance, testing, CI/CD, and App Store/Play release readiness.
description_zh: 提供原生iOS、Android及跨平台移动应用开发的具体模式。包含平台选择、架构和数据持久化的决策树，以及反模式警告和特定任务的模板链接。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for native iOS (Swift/SwiftUI), Android (Kotlin/Compose), and cross-platform (React Native) mobile development. Includes decision trees for platform selection, architecture, and data persistence, plus anti-pattern warnings and linked templates for specific tasks.

name: software-security-appsec
author: vasilyu1983
description: Modern application security patterns aligned with OWASP Top 10:2025 (final), OWASP API Security Top 10 (2023), NIST SSDF, zero trust (incl. NSA ZIGs 2026), supply chain security (SBOM), passkeys/WebAuthn, authentication, authorization, input validation, cryptography, plus security ROI, breach cost modeling, and compliance-driven enterprise sales.
description_zh: 提供可直接应用的应用程序安全模式，涵盖OWASP Top 10、API安全和安全开发生命周期。包含决策树、实施表格和事件响应手册，适用于实际开发场景。
_original_description: Provides actionable security patterns for application development, covering OWASP Top 10, API security, and secure SDLC. Includes decision trees, implementation tables, and incident response playbooks for real-world use.
